result.summary: QuintoAndar exposes a public MCP server at https://external-mcp-service.quintoandar.com.br/mcp-server/mcp with no authentication; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found on quintoandar.com.br.
result.description: QuintoAndar is a Brazilian digital real estate platform for renting, buying, and listing residential properties. It also provides related homeowner and market-information tools through its web platform.
